docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,106.00 FILED BY STAIDLE, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT MORNING, TOBY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE SAMUEL C. LAW FILED BY STAIDLE, STEPHANIE MORNING, TOBY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER 11/22/13 MINUTE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-02-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506."IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AGREED TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,106; PLAINTIFF AGREED TO SIGN A RELEASE AND RELEASE THE ADMINISTRATIVE RIGHT TO THE DEFENDANT'S COMPANY'S FACEBOOK PAGE." PER PRO TEM JUDGE SAMUEL C. LAW. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
